summary: Cold-start deep-link fix VERIFIED. All 7 review-request scenarios pass on the frontend. The `isDeepLink` allowlist in /app/frontend/app/_layout.tsx (lines 101-103) correctly short-circuits the cold-start router.replace() for pathnames starting with `/portal/` and for the fixed set {/support, /about, /billing, /privacy, /terms}. TEST1 /portal/agent (no params, fresh storage) ‚Üí final URL stays /portal/agent, `agent-portal` testID renders, AliveEmpty body reads 'Invalid or inactive link.' (Property agent portal). TEST2 /portal/tech ‚Üí `tech-portal` testID renders (invalid-link AliveEmpty branch). TEST3 /portal/tenant ‚Üí `tenant-portal` testID renders (invalid-link AliveEmpty branch). Role isolation confirmed: each portal renders its own screen with no cross-role data ‚Äî same AliveEmpty scaffold, no ActingAsBadge (invalid session), no tenant/tech/agent data leaks. TEST4 /support ‚Üí `support-screen` renders with 3 ListRow items visible (`support-message-circle` WhatsApp emerald, `support-mail` Email gold, `support-phone` Phone neutral) + `support-faq-title` SectionTitle. TEST5 /about ‚Üí `about-screen` renders with `about-platform-title` SectionTitle. TEST6 /billing ‚Üí `billing-screen` renders with `billing-plans-title` (count=3) + `billing-invoices-title` SectionTitles; current plan card (Executive ¬∑ ACTIVE ¬∑ AED 199) is visible in the screenshot. TEST7 Onboarding flow intact ‚Äî after localStorage.clear() and page.goto('/'), the guard still redirects to `/onboarding` and STEP 1 OF 4 renders. Backend testing was intentionally skipped per the review request (frontend-only retest). Non-blocking react-native-web console warnings persist (`shadow*` and `props.pointerEvents` deprecations) ‚Äî unchanged from prior iterations.

react_native_issues.issue: Console still surfaces '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow"' and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' on every screen load. Non-blocking; already tracked.

test_report_links: /app/backend/tests/test_role_isolation_regression.py (from iteration_4 ‚Äî not re-run in this iteration; frontend-only retest)
action_items: None required for the review request ‚Äî the fix works end-to-end.
Optional cleanup (still open from iteration_3/4): migrate remaining shadow* ‚Üí boxShadow and props.pointerEvents ‚Üí style.pointerEvents to silence RN-Web deprecation console noise.
critical_code_review_comments: _layout.tsx:101-103 ‚Äî clean allowlist: `const isDeepLink = pathname.startsWith('/portal/') || ['/support','/about','/billing','/privacy','/terms'].includes(pathname);`. Guard is applied only inside the cold-start effect, so subsequent navigation (persona/beta enforcement) still works correctly. Well-scoped fix.

Portal invalid-link branches on all three role screens (agent.tsx:32-39, tech.tsx:98-105, tenant.tsx:49-56) correctly render `AliveEmpty` and do NOT mount `ActingAsBadge` ‚Äî proving role isolation: an invalid link cannot bleed identity or data from another role.

Support / About / Billing screens use the Group 1/2 primitives consistently: `SectionTitle` (with `count` badge on Billing plans + invoices) and `ListRow` (WhatsApp/Email/Phone with distinct accents on Support). No hardcoded strings ‚Äî everything runs through `t()`.

success_rate.backend: not re-tested this iteration (frontend-only per review request); prior iteration_4 = 100% (22/22)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (7/7 review-request scenarios pass ‚Äî 3 portal invalid-link renders + /support + /about + /billing + onboarding regression)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Cold-start deep-link fix is stable. If future changes touch /app/frontend/app/_layout.tsx cold-start effect (lines 92-119), re-verify the 7 scenarios in this iteration: (1) clear storage + goto /portal/agent ‚Üí agent-portal testID + AliveEmpty; (2) /portal/tech; (3) /portal/tenant; (4) set spp.onboarded=true + goto /support ‚Üí support-screen + 3 ListRows + faq SectionTitle; (5) /about ‚Üí about-screen + platform SectionTitle; (6) /billing ‚Üí billing-screen + plans+invoices SectionTitles; (7) clear storage + goto / ‚Üí onboarding STEP 1 OF 4. To visually verify the ActingAsBadge (valid-session path), you still need a real agent/tech/tenant id+portalToken pair ‚Äî the owner-side QR-setup UI at /operational/portals is the source. Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_role_isolation_regression.py is unchanged and can be re-run any time.
rca_of_issue: N/A ‚Äî bug from iteration_4 is fixed. Root cause was over-aggressive cold-start `router.replace()` in _layout.tsx; mitigation shipped in the fix under review is the `isDeepLink` allowlist (lines 101-103 + guard on line 116). Verified working.
